outputs.description: When true, indicates that the employee's status is active in the third party integration. IAM.Vendor.brand Name of the integration.
outputs.name: IAM.Vendor.active

outputs.description: Provides the raw data from the third party integration. IAM.Vendor.email The employee's email address.
outputs.name: IAM.Vendor.details

outputs.description: HTTP error response code. IAM.Vendor.errorMessage Reason why the API failed.
outputs.name: IAM.Vendor.errorCode

outputs.description: The employee's user ID in the app. IAM.Vendor.instanceName Name of the integration instance.
outputs.name: IAM.Vendor.id

outputs.description: When true, indicates that the command was executed successfully. IAM.Vendor.username The employee's username in the app.
outputs.name: IAM.Vendor.success
